productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Galaxy Elite Sports Shoes
description: A best selling trainer, the Galaxy Elite shoes from adidas combines a unique sporty style, superior cushioning and excellent traction. Team this with adidas socks and performance sportswear and there’s no stopping you from emerging as the winner. Upper Synthetic leather uppers with perforations for absolute breathable comfort Strategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structure and support Inner sock-liner for wrap-around comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays in synthetic leather on the mid-foot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performance Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Meshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for snug comfort Mid-sole Injected EVA mid-sole for long time lightweight cushioning adiPRENE inserts in the heel for superior cushioning Out-sole Non-marking rubber out-sole made with adiWEAR technology for absolute durability Herringbone pattern grooves on the forefoot and grooved heel for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
